name: Passover Matzah Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs. Beat the yolks until light and frothy.
2. Beat the whites until stiff and dry.
3. Fold the whites into the yolks.
4. Add salt to the yolk mixture, about half a teaspoon.
5. Gradually add matzah meal to the egg mixture. Mix until well combined.
6. Place the mixture in the refrigerator for several hours.
7. Bring a large pot of water to a rolling boil and add 1 teaspoon of salt.
8. Wet your hands, shape the matzah mixture into balls about 1 inch in diameter.
9. Add the balls to the boiling water using a slotted spoon.
10. Do not add more until the first batch rises.
11. Cook for approximately half an hour.
12. Remove the cooked matzah balls with the slotted spoon.
13. If any of the balls fall apart, add small amounts of matzah meal until the consistency is proper.
